content_body: We had a fabulous time at this cabin. We chose to get away for relaxation. Even though it was only two of us, we decided to rent this 4-bedroom cabin for just us due to the amenities. We enjoyed the porches, the hot tub, the view, the kitchen amenities, grill, comfy beds...all of it. Everything was clean and comfortable. Loved the mobile app and the customer service. We are already planning another stay for the fall.
title: Fabulous Stay!
